parameters.query: SELECT tq.task_id::text, tq.lesson_id, tq.subject, tq.grade, tq.lang FROM nets_task_queue tq WHERE tq.status='done' AND tq.task_id NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT task_id FROM nets_validation_results) LIMIT 10
SELECT phase_id, output_json FROM nets_phase_outputs WHERE lesson_id='{{ $json.lesson_id }}'

INSERT INTO nets_validation_results (task_id, lesson_id, phase_id, check_type, passed, notes) VALUES ('{{ $json.task_id }}', '{{ $json.lesson_id }}', '{{ $json.phase_id }}', '{{ $json.check_type }}', {{ $json.passed }}, '{{ $json.notes }}')
